record.field:
# Generate 20 patients without forbidden imports Patient = env['health.patient'] Vital = env['health.vital.record'] Alert = env['health.alert']
first_names = ['John', 'Jane', 'Michael', 'Emily', 'William', 'Olivia', 'James', 'Sophia', 'Benjamin', 'Isabella', 'Lucas', 'Mia', 'Henry', 'Amelia', 'Alexander', 'Harper', 'Sebastian', 'Evelyn', 'Matthew', 'Abigail'] last_names = ['Smith', 'Johnson', 'Williams', 'Brown', 'Jones', 'Garcia', 'Miller', 'Davis', 'Rodriguez', 'Martinez', 'Hernandez', 'Lopez', 'Gonzalez', 'Wilson', 'Anderson', 'Thomas', 'Taylor', 'Moore', 'Jackson', 'Martin'] vital_types = ['blood_pressure', 'heart_rate', 'glucose', 'temperature', 'oxygen', 'respiratory_rate'] risk_levels = ['low', 'low', 'medium', 'medium', 'high', 'critical']
now = datetime.datetime.now()
for i in range(20): # pseudo-randomness without import random r_idx = (i * 7) % len(first_names) r_idx2 = (i * 13) % len(last_names) gender_choice = 'male' if (i % 2 == 0) else 'female' risk_choice = risk_levels[(i * 3) % len(risk_levels)]
patient = Patient.create({ 'name': f"{first_names[r_idx]} {last_names[r_idx2]}", 'age': 25 + (i * 17 % 60), 'gender': gender_choice, }) # Auto-follow for the user who generates data patient.message_subscribe(partner_ids=[env.user.partner_id.id])
num_vitals = 2 + (i % 3) for j in range(num_vitals): pseudo_val = (i * 11 + j * 7) % 100
hr = 60 + (pseudo_val * 0.7) bps = 90 + pseudo_val bpd = 60 + (pseudo_val / 2) glu = 70 + (pseudo_val * 1.8) temp = 36.0 + (pseudo_val * 0.035) o2 = 88 + (pseudo_val * 0.12) resp = 12 + (pseudo_val * 0.18)
rec_time = now - datetime.timedelta(hours=(j * 12 + i))
vital = Vital.create({ 'patient_id': patient.id, 'heart_rate': round(hr, 1), 'bp_systolic': round(bps, 1), 'bp_diastolic': round(bpd, 1), 'glucose': round(glu, 1), 'temperature': round(temp, 1), 'spo2': round(o2, 1), 'respiratory_rate': round(resp, 1), 'recorded_at': rec_time, })
action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'display_notification', 'params': { 'title': 'Success', 'message': 'Demo data generated successfully!', 'type': 'success', 'sticky': False, } }
